title: PEARL BUCK PRESCHOOL AND FAMILY SUPPORTS PROGRAM - 211info
text: PEARL BUCK CENTER PEARL BUCK PRESCHOOL AND FAMILY SUPPORTS PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides case management, resource referral, support, and advocacy services to students whose parents have borderline disabilities but are not eligible for state developmental disabilities services. Parenting support is offered through home visits and regular phone contact by the teacher or parent navigator. Also provides preschool services to children with average to above-average intelligence whose parents have a cognitive limitation. Meals and transportation are available for the half-day program. Transportation is offered for those in Eugene and Springfield. 3690 W 1st Avenue Eugene, OR 97402 Eligibility: Families with children and parents with cognitive differences. Preschool ages 2-5. Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4:30pm Half-day program for ages 3-4: Monday-Thursday 9am-12:30pm Half-day program for children age 2: Tuesday-Wednesday 9am-12:30pm Email (541) 484-4666 5107 , .. Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 484-4666 ext 5107 Crystal Morrison, Director [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Lane County Services: Disability Related Parenting Programs Preschools Other Services Offered At This Location: REHABILITATION/HABILITATION SERVICES - LIFE ENHANCING ACTIVITIES PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. PEARL BUCK CENTER
